The Close
THERE ARE TWO WAYS TO CLOSE IT. DO WHICHEVER SUITS YOU.
CLOSE #1
So that’s the program in a nutshell.
Sounds amaaaazing right? AWESOME.
The reason that we have the success rate that we do. The reason that most people who sign
up for the challenge meet their goal. The reason you, Susan, you said you are 198 right? The
reason you are going to be 178 or 173 6 weeks from now is that, people essentially make a
bet that they are going to hit their goal. So they pay for the program, it’s $499, and when you
hit the goal, you get your money back. Pretty cool right?
And the reason we had to do it with a deposit was because when we did it in the past without
a deposit, we had a whole bunch of people sign up for the program, and then guess what
happened…you guessed it, no one showed up. They had no skin in the game, so we went
back to the drawing board to figure out how we could make this amazingly effective program,
even more effective, and still make it free.
And once we flipped it like this, where you put money down, so you have skin in the game,
then get it back afterwards, the results took off and we knew we were onto to something.
So do you want one of the last spots?
The reason we are able to do this as a business is that most people hit the goal, but just like
you, once you lose 20lbs, are you going to have your goal body? No, of course not, you will
definitely be closer, but you’ll still want to keep working out and improving right? Of course,
and we know that, so we know that most people want to continue onwards after the
challenge, so you will be able to use your “winnings” towards a membership if you so
choose, or you can get it back straight up. It’s up to you. But we just know that most people
fall in love with us and want to keep going on their fitness journey. In fact, we’re banking on
it.
And if for some reason you don’t hit your goal, you will get $10/lb in credit towards staying.
So best case scenario, you get the whole 6 weeks free, worst case, you get a big discount on
an extended period of time, and either way, we get you to your goal weight of XYZ.
Make sense? Awesome.
You want one of the last spots?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

ALTERNATE CLOSE #2 (SEE WHICH FEELS BEST TO YOU/MORE ORGANIC)
You have just explained the entire program to them - after each piece of information you
explain to them it is important you ask
“Is that doable?”
And make sure they respond with a yes
(get all small yes’s before you ask for the big yes)
Setting up the close…
“So the second piece to the accountability is what we do to make sure that YOU hold
yourself to the program, show up to all your sessions, and stick to your nutrition when we
aren’t there to watch. We essentially ask you to make a bet that you will hit your goal. The
bet is you put down a deposit of $499 and at the end of the 6 Weeks once you have come to
all the classes, eaten according to plan and hit your goal - you get it back”
***Expect silence/large eyes/ laughter/ or anger - BUT DO NOT FEAR KEEP GOING***
“So - how this works for us as a business is (because people always ask how we can do this)
is that our goal is to gain more members and build our community. So for those who stick to
the program and are serious about their goals and health - we offer you a very sexy discount
after the 6 weeks if you’d like to stay and apply some of that toward a membership with us so
we can keep you from falling off :) Because you have had 6 Weeks to fall in love with us after
all ”
On top of that because we believe in the program so much, we have a money back
guarantee
ASK FOR THE SALE
“So - are you ready to get started?”
“Would you like one of the last spots?”
“Great – what card do you want to use?”
It’s important you remember that this is NOT a hard sale and providing the reason for WHY it
is not actually free is important (people are 70% more likely to say yes to something if there
is a good reason)
If someone asks why we can’t do it actually for free the answer is….
“Because we tried that the first two times and nobody showed up, it’s psychology - money is
of value to people therefore if you place value in something, you are about 4x more likely to
adhere to it. If you put your own skin in the game you will play that game much differently,
wouldn’t you?!”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
